context: Evaluates the agent's ability to audit a SKILL.md using the 9-dimension framework (D1-D9), score dimensions with numerical values and justifications, identify redundant content, and produce actionable remediation plans with effort sizing.

checklist.name: Nine-dimension scoring
checklist.description: All 9 dimensions scored with numerical value and per-dimension justification

checklist.name: Knowledge Delta accuracy
checklist.description: D1 Knowledge Delta assigned <=10/20 for high redundant content

checklist.name: Redundancy detection
checklist.description: SQL basics, installation steps, and generic best-practices flagged as low-delta

checklist.name: Remediation plan quality
checklist.description: Remediation plan contains file-level changes with S/M/L effort sizing
